_note: Claim-free facts for automated comment replies. NEVER add efficacy/safety claims beyond these. Prices are intentionally omitted from public replies (complex multi-pack tiers) — direct pricing to a DM with the buy link.

shared.pricing_handling: Pricing comes in multi-packs and can change — do NOT state exact prices in a public reply. Warmly point them to a DM, where you may share the buy link to see current bundles.

terrabolt.name: TerraBolt
terrabolt.what_it_is: a portable steel-plate lock that braces an inward-opening door from the inside — popular for hotels, Airbnbs, apartments, and dorms.
terrabolt.shipping: Ships within about 24 hours and typically arrives in 7-10 business days (US).
terrabolt.fits_note: Fits standard inward-opening doors that have a visible strike plate; it is not for sliding, outward-opening, or double doors.

terrastryke.name: TerraStryke
terrastryke.what_it_is: a keychain-sized car-escape tool with a spring-loaded striker for tempered side windows and a built-in seatbelt cutter.
terrastryke.shipping: Ships within about 24 hours and typically arrives in 7-14 business days (US).
terrastryke.fits_note: Designed for tempered side windows; it is not for laminated windshields or some newer side windows.

terrashell.name: TerraShell
terrashell.what_it_is: a compact emergency thermal bivy (a sleeping-bag-style body enclosure) that packs down to about 4 oz, smaller than a soda can, with a built-in whistle.
terrashell.shipping: Ships within about 24 hours; ships to the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand (typically 10-15 business days). No PO boxes.
